error_signature: Decompress Node doesn’t recognize cbz as zip
title: Decompress Node fails to extract cbz files
symptom: The Decompress Node does not extract files from a .cbz file, indicating it is not recognized as a zip file.
not_this_if: Decompress Node works with other zip files
root_cause: The Decompress Node requires the file extension to be specified without a dot for it to recognize the file type correctly. If the extension is set incorrectly, the node will not process the file as expected.
fix_steps: Open the Read/Write Files from Disk node settings
Change the 'File Extension' option from '.zip' to 'zip' (remove the dot)
agent_instruction: Change the file extension in the Read/Write Files node to 'zip' without the dot.
